{{Infobox construct
| name = Lindon's shield
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon's shield]] was created by him and [[Dross]] from scrap materials and [[dead matter]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon's shield]] is made primarily from [[force madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon's shield]] is not compatible with his [[Blackflame madra]] or his [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon's shield]] was made using the bulk of a turtle-[[Remnant]]'s stone-gray shell.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
